goal: Implement inventory.api.search_items by exposing reusable catalog filtering logic to API clients.
verification: Ran python -m pytest tests evaluation_tests in the project repository; 6 tests passed.
risks: search_items delegates filtering semantics to inventory.catalog.filter_items. Unknown query keys are ignored. min_price and max_price values are converted with float() and non-numeric, boolean, or non-finite values raise ValueError.
